title: kickxia schmidtii
intro: Kickxia schmidtii, also known as small bugle or small buglewort, is a type of flowering plant native to Europe and Western Asia. This perennial plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Kickxia schmidtii include reducing inflammation and soothing skin irritations, as well as being used to treat coughs and respiratory issues due to its expectorant properties. Kickxia schmidtii can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional folk medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
